query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A scene of trees and foliage with vertical yellow-green vegetation dominating the center, flanked by dark tree trunks on the left and right, with pale sky visible above and warm-toned ground below, captured in soft focus.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A scene of trees and foliage rendered with extreme vertical motion blur that streaks the yellow-green vegetation into elongated brushstrokes, blurs the dark tree trunks into soft smears, and dissolves all fine detail into a dreamy, impressionistic wash where the landscape becomes an abstract study of color and direction rather than recognizable nature.
